hero.subtext: Pryzen is building the core onchain layer for sports: a connected ecosystem where fans do not just watch the game, but follow, predict, participate, own, trade, and engage through a new digital sports economy.

ecosystem.fanAppDesc1: The Fan App is where fans live sports every day. Users follow their teams, leagues and players, find highlights, matches and news, publish their analyses, share their predictions and build their identity in a sports-first community designed for engagement, not just consumption.
ecosystem.fanAppDesc2: The Fan App is free, but built around a prediction system: users can win fan tokens or Base rewards based on their engagement and performance.
ecosystem.fanAppTokenNote: Fan tokens won are deposited on Base.
ecosystem.sportbookDesc: The Sportbook transforms sports betting into a social and onchain experience. Users don't just place a bet: they can share it, follow it publicly, register it on their profile, and tomorrow own it as a digital asset. Transparent, immersive and community-driven, it brings the action, proof and fan culture together in a single experience.
ecosystem.sportbookNote: Betting scope is focused only on these two chains: Polygon and Base.
ecosystem.teamIndexDesc: Team Index offers a new way to back a team through a structured onchain strategy built on Polymarket. User funds are held in USDC, then allocated across selected prediction markets tied to that team, such as match outcomes or longer-term futures. Instead of relying on opaque mechanics, the model is designed around clear market exposure, transparent positions, and a stable base unit. The goal is to give fans a simpler, more understandable way to participate in team performance through real prediction markets.
ecosystem.route2Label: USDC + Fan Token → Wrapped on Base
ecosystem.bottomNote: Note: the Base logo represents the Base network. Attached fan tokens (AFC, ACM, BAR, CITY) can be used as the wrapped participation path in Team Index.

benefits.label: Why Pryzen
benefits.heading: Future Interface Of Sports Culture Onchain
items: Social layer built into the product

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.heading: Simple On The Surface. Smart Underneath.
howItWorks.subtitle: For the user, Team Index is simple:

steps.title: Choose Your Sport Universe
steps.desc: Select your leagues, communities, and team focus.

steps.title: Follow, Predict, Or Back A Team
steps.desc: Engage with social insights, betting conviction, and market action.

steps.title: Unlock More Utility
steps.desc: Grow your identity and access through PRYX / PRYZE.

pryx.label: PRYX
pryx.heading: Identity, Status & Real Utility Across Pryzen
pryx.intro: PRYX is more than a collectible. It is your identity pass inside the Pryzen ecosystem — a visible symbol of status, participation, and access. Holding a PRYX gives users exclusive advantages across the Fan App, Social Sportsbook, and Team Index.
pryx.cardTitle: Your Pass Into the Pryzen Ecosystem
pryx.cardDesc: PRYX is the identity asset of Pryzen. It gives users more than ownership of a visual collectible: it gives them status, recognition, and access across the ecosystem. A PRYX holder is not just displaying an image, but holding a visible mark of participation inside Pryzen.

benefits.title: Enhanced Profile Identity
benefits.desc: Display your PRYX directly on your Pryzen profile with exclusive badges, rarity tiers, and visible holder status.

benefits.title: Sportsbook Advantages
benefits.desc: Unlock betting-related perks such as reduced odds margins, exclusive odds boosts, priority access to special betting campaigns, and limited reward events.

benefits.title: Exclusive Community Access
benefits.desc: Join private groups, holder-only prediction rooms, early product tests, and premium community experiences.

benefits.title: Priority Access to Drops & Features
benefits.desc: Get early access to new Pryzen launches, NFT ticket drops, Team Index campaigns, and selected platform features.

benefits.title: Recognition Across the Ecosystem
benefits.desc: PRYX holders receive premium visibility in leaderboards, social feeds, competitions, and community events.

benefits.title: Brand & Culture Ownership
benefits.desc: PRYX connects users to the long-term culture of Pryzen — not as spectators, but as early members of the ecosystem.

pryx.closingText: A PRYX is not just something users own. It is something they

pryze.label: PRYZE
pryze.heading: The Utility Token Powering the Pryzen Ecosystem
pryze.intro: PRYZE is the utility token of Pryzen. It connects the Fan App, Social Sportsbook, Team Index, and PRYX holders into one shared economy. It is designed to be used inside the platform, not just held.
pryze.cardDesc: PRYZE is not a speculative asset. It is a functional token designed to power every interaction inside Pryzen — from predictions and rewards to premium features and marketplace access.

benefits.title: Sportsbook Benefits
benefits.desc: Use PRYZE to unlock reduced odds margins, odds boosts, cashback campaigns, boosted rewards, and access to selected betting promotions.

benefits.title: Fan App Rewards
benefits.desc: Users can earn PRYZE by making predictions, winning competitions, climbing leaderboards, completing quests, and contributing to the sports community.

benefits.title: Team Index Access
benefits.desc: PRYZE can be used to access selected Team Index campaigns, reduce platform fees, unlock advanced analytics, or participate in special club-based opportunities.

benefits.title: Premium Features
benefits.desc: Unlock premium tools such as private prediction rooms, advanced stats, exclusive feeds, profile upgrades, and early access to new features.

benefits.title: NFT & Ticket Utility
benefits.desc: PRYZE can be used for PRYX-related drops, NFT betting ticket features, marketplace fees, and future collectible experiences inside Pryzen.

benefits.title: Ecosystem Incentives
benefits.desc: PRYZE rewards active users, creators, bettors, fans, and early supporters who help grow the Pryzen network.

pryze.closingText: PRYZE is the fuel of Pryzen. It powers

featured.label: Featured Experience
featured.heading: A Premium Lounge Where Social, Betting, And Team Markets Converge
featured.desc: Pryzen delivers a cinematic sports-tech atmosphere blending digital culture, social participation, and onchain conviction.

cta.heading: Join Pryzen Genesis
cta.subtitle: Enter the next era of sports

footer.powered: Powered by Polymarket. Built for fans.

roadmap.label: Roadmap
roadmap.heading: Strategic & Scalable Vision
roadmap.intro: Pryzen is built phase by phase: a product-first strategy where real usage and audience come before monetization and token mechanics.

phase0.label: Phase 0
phase0.title: Validated MVP
phase0.goal: prove that Pryzen is already a working product, not just an idea.
phase0.positioning: Proof of Product, not a concept.

groups.title: Team Index (Test Mode)
items: Users can "invest" in teams based on real performance
Allocation logic inspired by Harry Markowitz

phase1.label: Phase 1
phase1.title: From MVP to Scalable Product
phase1.goal: transform the MVP into a scalable, mainstream-ready product.

phase2.label: Phase 2
phase2.title: Base Integration
phase2.goal: anchor Pryzen into a credible sports ecosystem.
phase2.positioning: Product layer on top of existing sports blockchain infrastructure.

phase3.label: Phase 3
phase3.title: Building the Audience
phase3.goal: build a large and engaged user base.
phase3.positioning: Pryzen becomes the go-to app for sports fans and athletes — not just watching sports, but interacting, predicting, and engaging.

items: User acquisition strategy: crypto-native users → sports fans → mainstream audience

phase4.label: Phase 4
phase4.title: Expansion After Audience
phase4.goal: monetize and expand on top of an existing user base. Key principle: audience first, monetization second.
phase4.positioning: A direct-to-fan ecosystem unified inside one product.

groups.title: Web3 Ticketing Platform
items: NFT-based tickets: anti-scalping, traceability, exclusive perks
Integration with PRYX & fan tokens for access
groups.note: Reinvents ticketing by connecting fans directly to events.

groups.title: Sports Marketplace
items: Purchase jerseys, club merchandise, digital collectibles
Payments in crypto and fan tokens

groups.title: Streaming & Premium Content
items: Access via subscriptions, tokens, or PRYX status
groups.note: Content + engagement unified in one platform.

phase5.label: Phase 5
phase5.title: The Sports Super App
phase5.goal: become the default platform for sports interaction.
phase5.positioning: Pryzen evolves into a full-stack sports ecosystem.

groups.title: Comparable — but for sports
groups.note: Combined into one single product for sports.

why.label: Why This Strategy Works
why.heading: A Product-First Path
why.conclusion: This significantly reduces execution risk and increases credibility.
